company.name: Tesla
company.description: Designs and manufactures electric vehicles, energy storage systems, and solar products. Vertically integrated from battery cells to vehicle software.
company.audience: Product strategy and business development leadership
company.decisions: Vehicle program prioritization, market entry timing, supply chain sourcing, technology build-vs-buy, competitive positioning

categories.name: Competitor Vehicles
categories.description: New EV launches, platform announcements, pricing moves from rival OEMs

categories.name: Battery & Supply Chain
categories.description: Battery cell chemistry, raw materials, gigafactory builds, supplier moves

categories.name: Autonomous Driving
categories.description: Self-driving regulation, robotaxi deployments, ADAS competition

categories.name: Charging & Infrastructure
categories.description: Charging network expansion, standards (NACS/CCS), grid integration

categories.name: Regulatory & Policy
categories.description: EV mandates, emissions standards, tariffs, subsidies

categories.name: Energy & Storage
